arts.ttl: Stevenage chairman gives full backing to manager Alex Revell
arts.sum: "We had several people we talked to beforehand and every time I ever spoke to somebody in an informal interview, I just kept coming away thinking they were no better than Revs. A fans' forum at the Lamex say the question raised, what has Phil Wallace thought about the League One season so far, and what does he think of the 'Revs out' murmurings.

Leyton Orient ended their five-match losing run at Blackpool last time out and now have the chance to move within two points of the play-offs with another victory. But the O's are winless in their la...
